ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., R, C, L) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league the player plays in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Dominant hand the player shoots with (e.g., L, R) */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started playing professionally */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league the team plays in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" TEXT /* ID of the current coach */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner_id" TEXT /* ID of the current commissioner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_commissioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("commissioner_id") REFERENCES commissioners ("commissioner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the stats were recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored on the power play */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored */,
  "shooting_percentage" TEXT /* Shooting percentage of the player */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Average time on ice per game */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissioners" (
  "commissioner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each commissioner */,
  "commissioner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the commissioner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the commissioner */,
  "appointed_year" INTEGER /* Year the commissioner was appointed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commissioner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "from_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player was transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player was transferred to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
